Double Dissociation:
Each of two groups exhibits selective
deficits on two different tasks.

Double dissociations allow for strong inference about
cognition and neural structures.
** Parallel Processing Model is consistent with results.
**
Serial processing model would predict LH patients
would do poorly on both tasks.
